items.speaker: Anita
items.text: —Game. So, what do you think, Ashild?

items.speaker: Ashild
items.text: You... you're something else. No wonder Anita picked you. If anyone has a chance of stopping the professors, it's you, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: ...Now will you tell me what's really going on with the fan club?

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: Oh, just a minor administrative hiccup, that's all. A few professors have some... well, mild opinions about us. Long story short, they want me to disband the fan club.

options.text: That doesn't sound like a "mild opinion."

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: Actually, it's really just Professor Calith who wants the club gone. The others probably have their own reasons, but they all ended up on the same side.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: Ever since he returned from a trip to Septimont, he's convinced that playing Peaks of Prestige is a bad idea. Thinks we're all going to start flunking because we're too obsessed with dueling.

options.text: I mean... he's not entirely wrong.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: ...In reality, we have a rule in our fan club: If your grades slip because you're spending too much time dueling, you'll be kicked out.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: But don't worry. We've never actually had to kick anyone out. Everyone here gets that school comes first.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: Anyway, to stop the professors from disbanding the club, I made a bet with them.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: I'm the "leader" for the club, and Calith is the "leader" for the professors. Each side picks members to duel, and the last two standing get a shot at taking us down.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: If a leader gets defeated before the faculty's disbandment request is approved, that side loses the bet.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: If we lose, or we can't beat them before the paperwork goes through... we can say bye-bye to dueling.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: But if we win, the professors have to back off and drop the whole thing.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: The problem is, all the professors are crazy good, especially Professor Calith. So far, nobody in the club has even come close to beating him.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: But then I met you... And that match earlier proved my hunch was right. You're the one who can defeat the professors and save our club.

options.text: Alright, I'm in. What's the plan?

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: If you want to come out swinging, start with Professor Dennis.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: He's responsible for managing campus discipline. Total hard-ass, plays everything by the book.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: What's weird is that it doesn't seem like he's against Peaks of Prestige because it's "against the rules." He's got some other axe to grind.

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: He'll definitely accept your challenge. Go get us that first win!

items.speaker: Anita
items.text: Thank you, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Ashild
items.text: Well, Good... good luck, we're counting on you, {PlayerName}...!
